scripts.dev: sh -ac 'if [ -f .env ]; then set -a; . ./.env; set +a; fi; pnpm --parallel --filter @dockforge/api --filter @dockforge/web dev'
scripts.start:prod: sh -ac 'if [ -f .env ]; then set -a; . ./.env; set +a; fi; concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,green "pnpm --filter @dockforge/api start" "pnpm --filter @dockforge/web start"'
